nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
nodes.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、埃及雁、Western crested guinea fowl等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 彩鹬科
nodes.summary: 彩鹬科（Rostratulidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如半领彩鹬、彩鹬、Australian painted-snipe。

nodes.name: 彩鹬
nodes.summary: 彩鹬（Greater painted-snipe，学名 Rostratula benghalensis），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入彩鹬科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于塞舌尔、撒哈拉以南非洲，常见栖息地包括湿地、沼泽。

nodes.name: 塞舌尔
nodes.summary: 塞舌尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Malagasy coucal、Malagasy turtle dove、斑姬地鸠等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Greater painted-snipe are very widely distributed; in mainland Africa as well as Madagascar and the Seychelles; in India, and Southeast Asia. Within Africa, they are found in the Nile River Valley and in the non-rainforested areas of Sub-Saharan Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Greater painted-snipe are very widely distributed; in mainland Africa as well as Madagascar and the Seychelles; in India, and Southeast Asia. Within Africa, they are found in the Nile River Valley and in the non-rainforested areas of Sub-Saharan Africa

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It widely distributed across Africa and southern Asia and is found in a variety of wetland habitats, including swamps and the edges of larger water bodies such as lakes and rivers

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It widely distributed across Africa and southern Asia and is found in a variety of wetland habitats, including swamps and the edges of larger water bodies such as lakes and rivers
